---
title: "Team"
body-classes: page-title
page-layout: full

listing:

  - id: pi
    contents: jason-tsukahara/index.qmd
    template: templates/pi-card.ejs.md
    sort: "order asc"
    exclude:
      template: "yes"

  - id: grad-students
    contents: grad-students
    template: templates/grad-card.ejs.md
    sort: "order asc"

  - id: undergrads
    contents: undergrads
    template: templates/ra-card.ejs.md
    sort: "order asc"

  - id: team-news
    contents: ../news/posts/*.qmd
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../assets/news-listing-grid-notags.ejs.md
    fields: [title, date, description, path]
    include:
      categories: "Team"
---

::: {.page-header}

::: {.header-text}
::: {.header-title}
TEAM
:::

::: {.header-subtitle}
Meat the CALM Lab team.
:::
:::

:::

::: {#pi}
:::

::: {#grad-students}
:::

::: {#undergrads}
:::

<hr>
<br>

## Team News

::: {#team-news}
:::
